body.title: Create /outcome skill — review hypothesis at decision close
body.result: Created /outcome skill — hypothesis review at decision close, verdict + KR update
body.description:
The learning loop has no closure step. When the last ticket of a decision closes, /outcome reviews the hypothesis against observable evidence and records the result. This is what makes the system actually self-improving rather than just self-busy.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/outcome/SKILL.md (new); /sprint-ticket SKILL.md (add: on ticket close, check if last ticket of decision — if so, prompt /outcome)
**Design rules:** outcome record stored on the decision's palace node and .md file; feeds back to goal KRs
**Scope boundary:** in scope: read hypothesis from decision record, gather observable evidence (logs, metrics, psych log delta, eval questions), record verdict (confirmed/partially-confirmed/falsified/too-early), update goal KR progress note. Out of scope: auto-updating numeric KR values (requires eval infrastructure), automated triggering (prompt-based for now).
**Test plan:** skill file; manual smoke: run /outcome on D-igor-cognition-research-improvements-2026-05-17 using existing post-ship observations.
